featureName: Chrome Extension Bridge (Live Bookmarks + Browser History)
planningOnlyJustification: Planning complete (5 scopes, 21 scenarios, design ready). Spec 060 dependency Scopes 1+2 SHIPPED. Flipped to full-delivery 2026-05-28 to unblock bubbles.implement for Scopes 1+2.

executionHistory.summary: Authored design.md covering architecture (MV3 extension at extensions/chrome-bridge/, server endpoint POST /v1/connectors/extension/ingest), wire schema bound to connector.RawArtifact with enumerated Metadata keys, server-authoritative dedup table, spec 044 bearer auth reuse. Flagged OQ-DSN-1 (spec 044 scope claim amendment) as blocking dependency; routing packet captured in §12.1.

Authored scopes.md with 5 sequential vertical-slice scopes (server endpoint + SST, server dedup, MV3 extension skeleton, build/release wiring, operator docs + devices view). Authored scenario-manifest.json with 21 stable SCN-058-NNN contracts mapped to live tests. Initialized report.md and uservalidation.md templates. Consumed shipped spec 060 RequireScope primitive (Scopes 1+2 SHIPPED — OQ-DSN-1 resolved upstream); wire scope tuple is auth.RequireScope("extension:bookmarks", "extension:history") with AND-semantics per design §1.1 and §5.1. SST-zero-defaults preserved; Build-Once Deploy-Many honored (signed-zip via cosign keyless, build-manifest entry). Adversarial regression rows planned for each high-risk scope (AND-semantics exact-match, Chrome-Sync device-id, boundary-collision separator hygiene, corrupted-IndexedDB-row drainer resilience).

scopeProgress.name: Server Ingest Endpoint + SST Config + Scope-Gated Mount
Server Dedup Table + Keyer + Upsert Path
Chrome MV3 Extension Skeleton + Background WAL + Options Page

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Planning complete (bubbles.plan, 2026-05-28). 5 scopes, 21 SCN contracts. Spec 060 Scopes 1+2 dependency SHIPPED — OQ-DSN-1 resolved.
